
### Combined
```{r}
scatterMatrixSouthChlA <- scatterMatrixSouthChlA + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
scatterMatrixSouthChlB <- scatterMatrixSouthChlB + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
scatterMatrixSouthAstaxanthin <- scatterMatrixSouthAstaxanthin + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
scatterMatrixSouthLutein <- scatterMatrixSouthLutein + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
scatterMatrixSouthPheophorbide <- scatterMatrixSouthPheophorbide + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())

scatterMatrixSouth <- (
  scatterMatrixSouthChlA /
  scatterMatrixSouthChlB /
  scatterMatrixSouthAstaxanthin /
  scatterMatrixSouthLutein /
  scatterMatrixSouthBetaC 
) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", heights = c(1,1,1,1,1)) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2)) 

scatterMatrixSouth

ggsave(scatterMatrixSouth, filename = "scatterMatrixSouth.png", width = 8, height = 9.5, bg = "white")
```

```{r}
scatterMatrixSouthDeg <- (
  scatterMatrixSouthPheophorbide /
  scatterMatrixSouthPheophytin 
) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", heights = c(1,1)) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.margin = margin(2,2,2,2)) 

scatterMatrixSouthDeg

ggsave(scatterMatrixSouthDeg, filename = "scatterMatrixSouthDeg.png", width = 8, height = 5, bg = "white")
```

# Heat Maps - Pigments & Anions {.tabset}

## North and South Regions (All Samples)
```{r}
# Define pigment and anion variables
pigment_vars <- c("ChlA", "ChlB", "Astaxanthin", "Lutein", "BetaC", "Pheophorbide", "Pheophytin")
anion_vars <- c("Cl", "NO2NO3", "SO42", "PO43", "Fo")

# Filter to just the necessary columns & regions
df_filtered <- dfAnion %>%
  select(APLoc, all_of(pigment_vars), all_of(anion_vars)) %>%
  filter(APLoc %in% c("North", "South")) %>%
  na.omit()

# Function to compute pigment–anion Spearman correlations per region
get_pigment_anion_corr <- function(data, aploc_name) {
  cor_matrix <- rcorr(as.matrix(data[, -1]), type = "spearman")

  r_vals <- cor_matrix$r
  p_vals <- cor_matrix$P

  # Create all pigment–anion pair combinations
  pairs <- expand.grid(Pigment = pigment_vars, Anion = anion_vars, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  results <- pairs %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      Spearman_r = r_vals[Anion, Pigment],
      p_value = p_vals[Anion, Pigment],
      significant = p_value < 0.05,
      label = paste0(round(Spearman_r, 2), "\n(p=", round(p_value, 3), ")"),
      APLoc = aploc_name
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(results)
}

# Compute correlations for each APLoc region
cor_results <- df_filtered %>%
  group_split(APLoc) %>%
  map_dfr(~get_pigment_anion_corr(.x, unique(.x$APLoc)))

# Convert to factors to preserve axis order
cor_results$Pigment <- factor(cor_results$Pigment, levels = pigment_vars)
cor_results$Anion <- factor(cor_results$Anion, levels = anion_vars)

# Plot
heatmapPigAnion <- ggplot(cor_results, aes(x = Pigment, y = Anion, fill = Spearman_r)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_tile(data = filter(cor_results, significant), color = "black", linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~APLoc, ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, name = "Spearman r") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

heatmapPigAnion

ggsave(heatmapPigAnion, filename = "heatmapPigAnion.png", width = 7, height = 9, bg = "white")
```

## North and South Regions (Red Samples)
```{r}
# Define pigment and anion variables
pigment_vars <- c("ChlA", "ChlB", "Astaxanthin", "Lutein", "BetaC", "Pheophorbide", "Pheophytin")
anion_vars <- c("Cl", "NO2NO3", "SO42", "PO43", "Fo")

# Filter to just the necessary columns & regions
df_filtered <- dfAnion %>%
  filter(Color == "red") %>% 
  select(APLoc, all_of(pigment_vars), all_of(anion_vars)) %>%
  filter(APLoc %in% c("North", "South")) %>%
  na.omit()

# Function to compute pigment–anion Spearman correlations per region
get_pigment_anion_corr <- function(data, aploc_name) {
  cor_matrix <- rcorr(as.matrix(data[, -1]), type = "spearman")

  r_vals <- cor_matrix$r
  p_vals <- cor_matrix$P

  # Create all pigment–anion pair combinations
  pairs <- expand.grid(Pigment = pigment_vars, Anion = anion_vars, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  results <- pairs %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      Spearman_r = r_vals[Anion, Pigment],
      p_value = p_vals[Anion, Pigment],
      significant = p_value < 0.05,
      label = paste0(round(Spearman_r, 2), "\n(p=", round(p_value, 3), ")"),
      APLoc = aploc_name
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(results)
}

# Compute correlations for each APLoc region
cor_results <- df_filtered %>%
  group_split(APLoc) %>%
  map_dfr(~get_pigment_anion_corr(.x, unique(.x$APLoc)))

# Convert to factors to preserve axis order
cor_results$Pigment <- factor(cor_results$Pigment, levels = pigment_vars)
cor_results$Anion <- factor(cor_results$Anion, levels = anion_vars)

# Plot
heatmapPigAnion_Red <- ggplot(cor_results, aes(x = Pigment, y = Anion, fill = Spearman_r)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_tile(data = filter(cor_results, significant), color = "black", linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~APLoc, ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, name = "Spearman r") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

heatmapPigAnion_Red

ggsave(heatmapPigAnion_Red, filename = "heatmapPigAnion_Red.png", width = 7, height = 9, bg = "white")
```

## North and South Regions (Green Samples)
```{r}
# Define pigment and anion variables
pigment_vars <- c("ChlA", "ChlB", "Astaxanthin", "Lutein", "BetaC", "Pheophorbide", "Pheophytin")
anion_vars <- c("Cl", "NO2NO3", "SO42", "PO43", "Fo")

# Filter to just the necessary columns & regions
df_filtered <- dfAnion %>%
  filter(Color == "green") %>% 
  select(APLoc, all_of(pigment_vars), all_of(anion_vars)) %>%
  filter(APLoc %in% c("North", "South")) %>%
  na.omit()

# Function to compute pigment–anion Spearman correlations per region
get_pigment_anion_corr <- function(data, aploc_name) {
  cor_matrix <- rcorr(as.matrix(data[, -1]), type = "spearman")

  r_vals <- cor_matrix$r
  p_vals <- cor_matrix$P

  # Create all pigment–anion pair combinations
  pairs <- expand.grid(Pigment = pigment_vars, Anion = anion_vars, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  results <- pairs %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      Spearman_r = r_vals[Anion, Pigment],
      p_value = p_vals[Anion, Pigment],
      significant = p_value < 0.05,
      label = paste0(round(Spearman_r, 2), "\n(p=", round(p_value, 3), ")"),
      APLoc = aploc_name
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(results)
}

# Compute correlations for each APLoc region
cor_results <- df_filtered %>%
  group_split(APLoc) %>%
  map_dfr(~get_pigment_anion_corr(.x, unique(.x$APLoc)))

# Convert to factors to preserve axis order
cor_results$Pigment <- factor(cor_results$Pigment, levels = pigment_vars)
cor_results$Anion <- factor(cor_results$Anion, levels = anion_vars)

# Plot
heatmapPigAnion_Green <- ggplot(cor_results, aes(x = Pigment, y = Anion, fill = Spearman_r)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_tile(data = filter(cor_results, significant), color = "black", linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~APLoc, ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, name = "Spearman r") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

heatmapPigAnion_Green

ggsave(heatmapPigAnion_Green, filename = "heatmapPigAnion_Green.png", width = 7, height = 9, bg = "white")
```
